title: ECG: T wave changes
body_html:
Peaked T waves
  • hyperkalaemia
  • myocardial ischaemia

Inverted T waves
  • myocardial ischaemia
  • digoxin toxicity
  • subarachnoid haemorrhage
  • arrhythmogenic right ventricular cardiomyopathy
  • pulmonary embolism ('S1Q3T3')
  • Brugada syndrome
